business_overview: string — business name, location, industry, company type, brief industry context
loan_structure: string — loan amount, SBA guarantee, term, lender, approval date, delivery method
credit_analysis: string — monthly payment, guarantee coverage %, term band, industry risk tier, risk band, repayment flag
repayment_capacity: string — assessment of ability to service debt from available signals
risk_factors: string — specific risks for this borrower: industry, loan structure, history
mitigants: string — factors that reduce identified risks
recommendation: string — Approve / Decline / Approve with Conditions + reasoning + human sign-off notice
